title: Coriophyllus bethelii
taxonomy: Coriophyllus bethelii is a species of flowering plant in the family Saxifragaceae, although some sources place it in the family Icacinaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region. This plant is not well-studied, and its classification may be subject to change as new research emerges. More information is needed to confirm its classification with certainty.
